name: Cocolat Walnut Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt broken chocolate with butter, stirring constantly until smooth. Set aside.
2. Beat egg yolks for 1 to 2 minutes. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar and vanilla. Mix in the chocolate and butter mixture.
3. Fold in flour and ground walnuts. Beat egg whites with a pinch of cream of tartar until foamy.
4. Gradually add the remaining 1/2 cup sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
5. Blend one-fourth of the egg whites into the chocolate mixture. Fold in the remaining egg whites.
6. Pour batter into a 9-inch springform pan lined with parchment paper. Bake at 375°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until the sides start to separate from the pan but the center is still moist.
7. Cool on a rack. Remove torte from the pan.
8. Frost with Cocolat Rum Glaze. Separate recipe
